# PJS Plumbing & Heating Services

## Business Overview

PJS Plumbing & Heating Services is a sole-trader plumbing and heating business operated by Paul Scott, a Gas Safe registered engineer with over 40 years of experience.

## Name, Address & Phone (NAP)

PJS Plumbing & Heating Services, Liverpool & Knowsley, Merseyside. Tel: 0151 440 2614

## Website

https://liverpoolsplumber.co.uk

## Gas Safe Registration

Paul Scott is Gas Safe registered. Registration number: 221708
Verifiable at: https://www.gassaferegister.co.uk/

## Services Offered

- Emergency Plumbing (24/7, Liverpool & Knowsley)
- Boiler Repair & Servicing (all makes and models)
- Central Heating Installation & Repairs
- Powerflushing
- Radiator Installation & Replacement
- Gas Safety Certificates (CP12) for landlords
- General Plumbing (leaks, taps, toilets, drains, showers, bathrooms)

## Service Area

Primary coverage: Liverpool, Knowsley, Merseyside
Also covers: Huyton, Prescot, Whiston, Rainhill, Kirkby, Halewood, St Helens

## Key Facts

- 40+ years on the tools
- Sole trader — you speak directly to Paul (no call centres)
- Gas Safe registered (#221708)
- Fully insured
- 24/7 emergency response
- Honest, upfront pricing — no hidden fees
